jobs.title: My jobs
jobs.subtitle: Manage the jobs you posted.
jobs.empty: You haven't posted any jobs yet. Click "New job" to get started.

edit.title: Edit job
edit.notFound: Job not found or you lack permission.

applications.title: Applications received
applications.empty: Nobody has applied to this job yet.

banner.title: Your privacy
banner.body: We use essential cookies to make the service work. Analytics cookies are only enabled if you consent.

essential.name: Essential
essential.desc: Session, authentication, language and theme. Always on.

errors.network: No connection to the server. Check your internet.
errors.slugInUse: That slug is already taken. Choose another.

actions.deletedShareConfirm: Remove this shared link? Aliases will go with it.
actions.followUpConfirm: Mark as follow-up sent? This resets the silence counter.
actions.claimedProfile: Profile claimed. We added the data to your resume.

nav.searchSoonPosts: Search in posts is coming soon.
nav.searchSoonCompanies: Search in companies is coming soon.

applyModes.heroTitle: Pick how you want to apply
applyModes.heroSubtitle: Three modes, one plan. Start with One-Click — unlock the other modes as they roll out.
applyModes.notifySuccess: We'll email you when this mode is live.

oneClick.title: One-Click Apply
oneClick.tagline: You click, the AI crafts the CV.
oneClick.description: On any job, click Apply and the AI tailors your resume and cover letter to that role — no manual editing, no formatting headaches.
oneClick.feature1: Resume rewritten per job in seconds
oneClick.feature2: Cover letter drafted from your profile
oneClick.tailorVerbatimDescription: The master resume is sent without modifications.
oneClick.tailorAiDescription: Patch reorders sections, highlights relevant skills, and generates an optimized version.
oneClick.saveError: Failed to save. Local draft preserved.

curated.title: Weekly Curated
curated.description: Every Monday 9am we deliver 5 jobs with fit ≥80% to your inbox. One click to approve each application; we apply on Tuesday.
curated.feature4: You stay in the driver's seat

autoApply.title: Auto-Apply Engine
autoApply.tagline: Set criteria once. Interviews land in your inbox.
autoApply.description: Define your target stack, seniority, salary floor and remote policy. The engine monitors new openings, applies on your behalf, and pings you only when a hiring team responds.

cv.masterHelp: Your canonical profile. The AI uses it as the base for every tailored version.
cv.versionsEmpty: No tailored versions yet. Open a job and click "Rerender for this role".
cv.emptyTitle: You don't have a CV yet
cv.emptyBody: Finish onboarding and we'll build your master CV in a few minutes.

rerender.title: Rerender for a role
rerender.subtitle: Pick a role and see how the AI would rewrite your summary.
rerender.demoDisclaimer: Demo — the real AI will use your full resume after signup.

dashboard.heroSubtitle: Here's what's moving your career today.
dashboard.applicationsEmpty: You haven't applied to any job yet.
dashboard.eventsComingSoon: Events launching soon — AMAs, workshops and meetups.

start.title: How should we get you started?
start.subtitle: Pick the fastest path for you. You'll see your first job suggestion in under 2 minutes.
start.comingSoonBody: We're polishing this import. For now, use another option — you can always come back and enrich your profile later.

import.linkedinUnavailableToast: LinkedIn import is still under construction — use PDF or GitHub for now.

claimShadow.heading: We found a profile for you

review.inactiveHeading: This review link is no longer active

network.connectError: Could not send the connection request

network.unblockConfirmMessage: They will be able to message you and see your content again.
network.suggestionsEmpty: We're out of people to suggest right now. Check back later.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.backendPendingDescription: The audit log requires the backend endpoint GET /admin/audit-log. This page is a placeholder so the navigation and layout are ready once the endpoint ships.

users.title: User Management
users.name: Name
users.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
users.detailComingSoonDescription: The full page with role editing, suspension and impersonate hasn't been released yet — it depends on admin endpoints to ship in the next phase.

health.title: Health & Infrastructure
health.checkPendingDescription: The /platform/check endpoint hasn't been exposed by the client-only spec yet. Come back when the backend ships the typed route.

devTools.heading: Dev Tools
devTools.toolAdminTestRunnerDescription: Run admin test suites (seed-check, auth-flow, etc.).
devTools.toolBackendConnectionDescription: Diagnose connectivity with the API and dependent services.

settings.deleteAccountWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data, resumes, and account information will be permanently deleted.
settings.typeToConfirm: Type DELETE MY ACCOUNT to confirm

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.preferencesIntro: Choose which events trigger a notification. Disabled events are silently dropped on the server.

preferenceTypes.POST_LIKED: When someone reacts to your post
preferenceTypes.POST_COMMENTED: When someone comments on your post
preferenceTypes.COMMENT_REPLIED: When someone replies to your comment
preferenceTypes.CONNECTION_REQUEST: When someone sends you a connection request
preferenceTypes.SKILL_DECAY: When one of your skills has gone stale
preferenceTypes.APPLICATION_STALE: When a job application has had no response
preferenceTypes.CONNECTION_RECOMMENDATION: When we have new connection suggestions for you

seo.description: Tech-focused AI that rewrites your resume for each job, beats ATS at 90%+ and runs Auto-Apply on real matches. Your career, patched.
